siteShareDecision.title: Your contribution to 1💗1
siteShareDecision.sub: Out of what you earned ({basis} {currency}) — 1💗1's management & partnership service. Suggested: {proposed} {currency}. Give as suggested, more, or less — it's your personal contribution and doesn't change the other partners' shares.
siteShareDecision.skipped: You chose not to give this time. You can change it.
siteShareDecision.gave: You gave {amount} {currency}. You can update it.

openSiteShareReminder.title: Open contribution decisions
openSiteShareReminder.sub: You still have a personal 1💗1 contribution to decide on the splits below. Give, or choose not to this time.

siteSharePayCard.errZeroSkip: No transfer for a skipped or zero split
siteSharePayCard.errNotOwner: Only the contribution owner can transfer
siteSharePayCard.body: You committed to give 1💗1 from this split. Coordinate in chat and confirm once you sent the money. It completes when the receiver confirms too.
siteSharePayCard.noVol: No 1💗1 member has volunteered to receive yet. The transfer opens once someone does.

siteShareAutoApprovedCard.autoNotice: This split already auto-approved and closed. You did not block it — all that is left is to confirm your personal giving to 1💗1.
siteShareAutoApprovedCard.body: Choose how much to give 1💗1 from your personal share of this split, or skip this time. It doesn't affect what the partners split.

siteShareIncomeCard.body: This is site-share income from a rikma's members. There's no product or delivery step — just make sure someone volunteers to receive, and that giver and receiver confirm the money moved.
siteShareIncomeCard.noTransfers: No member transfers yet. They appear here once a giving member picks a receiver and sends.
